dict.string: Scan the pairing QR shown by the Jesse bridge, and take photos to attach to a conversation.
Transcribe the audio you speak on your Apple Watch, and the request you speak after a hands-free “Vault Search Jesse”, so Jesse can answer it.
Record the request you speak after a hands-free “Vault Search Jesse” so Jesse can transcribe and answer it on this iPhone.

Jesse attaches a compact summary of your recent Apple Health — sleep, resting heart rate and other daily vitals, plus recent workouts — so you can ask it to log a workout or reflect on how you’re doing.
